textPlain: Good article, but my spider sense tingles with AMD sponsored content.

Thankfully the content is actually provided by us without any sponsorship! We ran into a memory bandwidth problem on one of these devices, wrote some small tests for it and ran it on the other devices as well. Indeed tho, the AMD gpus do seem to have extremely linear cache performance.Full disclosure: I do run the company behind Evolve.
Why do you think it's a good article?
